items.exactFormula:
IF(
  {fldpukA5h9bxCw2L6} = 1,
  IF(
    OR(
      {fldovPSREAUf4TkeY} = BLANK(),
      {fldsgzEskQIVRDFiY} = BLANK()
    ),
    BLANK(),
    {fldovPSREAUf4TkeY} &
    "|" &
    IF(
      {fld3bxJqGs4E8jB7j} = "Live",
      "LIVE",
      "REC"
    )
  ),
  BLANK()
)
items.description: Stage 17 Zoom Attendance field
items.validationRuleAfterCreation: Field `Preconflict Pair Tag` exists type=formula; formula valid and amount resolves for recording

items.exactFormula:
IF(
  AND(
    {fldpukA5h9bxCw2L6} = 1,
    {fldXpn2rNrctyLac0} != 1
  ),
  1,
  0
)
items.description: Stage 17 Zoom Attendance field
items.validationRuleAfterCreation: Field `Zoom Credit Approved?` exists type=formula; formula valid and amount resolves for recording

items.exactFormula:
IF(
  OR(
    {fldovPSREAUf4TkeY} = BLANK(),
    {fld08lAdEm1TQElUC} = BLANK()
  ),
  0,
  IF(
    AND(
      FIND(
        {fldovPSREAUf4TkeY} & "|LIVE",
        {fld08lAdEm1TQElUC} & ""
      ) > 0,
      FIND(
        {fldovPSREAUf4TkeY} & "|REC",
        {fld08lAdEm1TQElUC} & ""
      ) > 0
    ),
    1,
    0
  )
)

items.exactFormula:
"Method=" & {fld3bxJqGs4E8jB7j} &
" | LiveConfirmed=" &
IF({fldPNJzsEy6cMzYxd} = 1, "Y", "N") &
" | Review=" & {fldWcpZKa0Qq0jnYV} &
" | Satisfactory=" &
IF({fldyHfzYweXOvukvl} = 1, "Y", "N") &
" | PreApproved=" &
IF({fldpukA5h9bxCw2L6} = 1, "Y", "N") &
" | Conflict=" &
IF({fldXpn2rNrctyLac0} = 1, "Y", "N") &
" | Approved=" &
IF({fldJpQxQQuibUdi5w} = 1, "Y", "N") &
" | Pct=" & {fld5ArV0SeMcHFcfw} &
" | XP=" & {fldplqn2f7yFwwyfg} &
" | Gate=" &
IF({fldQR07soikQsD9nm} = 1, "Y", "N") &
" | Key=" & {fldhaYb9gaCndiQvx} &
" | EnrollmentRID=" & {fldovPSREAUf4TkeY} &
" | MeetingRID=" & {fldsgzEskQIVRDFiY} &
" | EffectivePct=" & {fldLD3TUULTJC6yMW} &
" | EffectiveGate=" &
{fldOycbJ145fdx123} &
" | EffectiveCoachApproval=" &
{fldKzXPUskh2UxwIz} &
" | Deadline=" &
{fldJnSfq7APTY3JD5}

items.exactFormula:
IF(
  {fld3bxJqGs4E8jB7j} = "Live",
  IF({fldPNJzsEy6cMzYxd} = 1, 1, 0),
  IF(
    {fld3bxJqGs4E8jB7j} = "Recording Quiz",
    IF(
      AND(
        OR(
          {fldl71FnAgxveYyjO} = BLANK(),
          {fldl71FnAgxveYyjO} = 1
        ),
        IF(
          OR(
            {fldKzXPUskh2UxwIz} = BLANK(),
            {fldKzXPUskh2UxwIz} = 1
          ),
          AND(
            {fldWcpZKa0Qq0jnYV} = "Satisfactory",
            {fldyHfzYweXOvukvl} = 1
          ),
          OR(
            {fldWcpZKa0Qq0jnYV} = "Satisfactory",
            {fldWcpZKa0Qq0jnYV} = "Needs Review"
          )
        )
      ),
      1,
      0
    ),
    0
  )
)

items.exactFormula:
IF(
  {fldXpn2rNrctyLac0} = 1,
  0,
  IF(
    {fldJpQxQQuibUdi5w} != 1,
    0,
    IF(
      {fld3bxJqGs4E8jB7j} = "Live",
      1,
      IF(
        AND(
          {fld3bxJqGs4E8jB7j} = "Recording Quiz",
          {fldOycbJ145fdx123} = 1
        ),
        1,
        0
      )
    )
  )
)

IF(
  OR(
    {fldXpn2rNrctyLac0} = 1,
    {fldJpQxQQuibUdi5w} != 1
  ),
  0,
  IF(
    {fldipxuIl3SpoyC6G} = BLANK(),
    0,
    FLOOR({fldipxuIl3SpoyC6G} * {fld5ArV0SeMcHFcfw} / 100)

)

items.exactFormula:
IF(
  {fldXpn2rNrctyLac0} = 1,
  0,
  IF(
    {fldpukA5h9bxCw2L6} != 1,
    0,
    IF(
      {fld3bxJqGs4E8jB7j} = "Live",
      100,
      IF(
        {fld3bxJqGs4E8jB7j} = "Recording Quiz",
        IF(
          {fldLD3TUULTJC6yMW} = BLANK(),
          50,
          {fldLD3TUULTJC6yMW}
        ),
        0
      )
    )
  )
)

items.exactFormula:
IF(
  OR(
    {fld2AzW975HGKDsEG} = BLANK(),
    {fldpsIjB9bnNRa8vW} != "Recording Quiz"
  ),
  BLANK(),
  SWITCH(
    IF({fldnwzUITHTzEeR5n} = BLANK(), "Later of Both", {fldnwzUITHTzEeR5n}),
    "Days After Recording Available",
      DATEADD({fld2AzW975HGKDsEG}, IF({fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL} = BLANK(), 7, {fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL}), 'days'),
    "End of Program Week",
      IF({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y} = BLANK(), BLANK(), DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y}), 'YYYY-MM-DD')),
    "Earlier of Both",
      IF(
        OR({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y} = BLANK(), {fld2AzW975HGKDsEG} = BLANK()),
        IF({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y} = BLANK(), DATEADD({fld2AzW975HGKDsEG}, IF({fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL} = BLANK(), 7, {fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL}), 'days'), DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y}), 'YYYY-MM-DD')),
        IF(
          DATETIME_DIFF(DATEADD({fld2AzW975HGKDsEG}, IF({fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL} = BLANK(), 7, {fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL}), 'days'), DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y}), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'seconds') <= 0,
          DATEADD({fld2AzW975HGKDsEG}, IF({fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL} = BLANK(), 7, {fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL}), 'days'),
          DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y}), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        )
      ),
      IF(
        OR({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y} = BLANK(), {fld2AzW975HGKDsEG} = BLANK()),
        IF({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y} = BLANK(), DATEADD({fld2AzW975HGKDsEG}, IF({fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL} = BLANK(), 7, {fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL}), 'days'), DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y}), 'YYYY-MM-DD')),
        IF(
          DATETIME_DIFF(DATEADD({fld2AzW975HGKDsEG}, IF({fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL} = BLANK(), 7, {fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL}), 'days'), DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y}), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'seconds') >= 0,
          DATEADD({fld2AzW975HGKDsEG}, IF({fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL} = BLANK(), 7, {fldfDKHOn54ZbH7XL}), 'days'),
          DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldmeNbIm6UVQZI9Y}), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        )
      )
  )
)
